items.title: Why PCB Assembly Should Start Before Your PCB Layout Is Finished

Requirements → Schematic → PCB Layout → Gerber Files → PCB Assembly

On paper, this process looks perfectly logical.

items.title: translateZ()

items.title: translateY()
